Hi everybody, I will make this a quick, quick, quick introduction to the cookbook, the virtual cookbook that you have now access to. So what we did was we took the cookbook that we already had, the PDF, cleaned it up, made a better version of it, and then made, or asked kindly, and then proceeded to give money to a videographer to professionally make 30-second videos of each one of them. So one of those like really high, like where you see the hands making everything, videos that are 100% white labeled, we've made them silent so that if you want to put voice overs on them you can, or if you don't, you don't have to either. But since everything's white labeled, you will be able to give this to all of your customers and look super, super legit, and all you have to do is slap your logo on it and click the share link so you can have everything. We try to make this as low work as possible for you so that you can provide as much value to your end user. The reason I think these things are cool is because I think first impressions are really important and you can really blow some all away with a first impression if they get their great meal plan in their new cookbook and they get access to all these videos, they're like wow, they really did this up and they'll start to really increase their perceived value of it. And what that'll do is decrease the amount of people who are backing out and then also give you a little bit more leverage in the conversation should someone try and say like this wasn't valuable or anything like that. So it just gives you more ammunition. It can also help on the sale, but I don't like bringing up too many features because that's not what makes people buy. But anyways, we put a ton of effort into this, a lot of back and forth to make the videos exactly what we wanted them so that they were short, digestible, easy to use, and so that ultimately your customers will enjoy them, use them, and then lose more weight and then like you even more and give you more money. So I hope you guys enjoy using it. We try to make this as simple as humanly possible so that you can not spend a ton of time doing tech stuff, but actually just like slap your logo on it, make one video for the intro, and then you pretty much just need to do that to get this thing live. So I hope that makes sense for you and enjoy.
